cons_result_help: Take or upload a photo of the completed hairstyle to finish the consultation and create your Social Kit.
hero_sub: AI-powered consultation intelligence for modern professionals who want structure, confidence, and revenue clarity.
problem_body: Clients describe what they want in words. Stylists and Barbers interpret through experience and skill. The gap between expectation and outcome can cost trust, time, and revenue — before scissors ever touch hair.
problem_bold: AXIS HAIR™ closes that gap before it opens.
solution_pillar1_desc: Let clients visualize potential results before the appointment. Reduce uncertainty and increase trust.
solution_pillar2_desc: Structured, professional-driven recommendations that feel personal — not generic.
solution_pillar3_desc: Track approved consultations and expected income automatically — without spreadsheets.
how_headline: Four steps. Two sides. Zero confusion.
how_step1_title: STEP 1 — Upload or Take a Photo
how_step1_desc: Client uploads a photo or takes a selfie to begin consultation.
how_step2_desc: Receive realistic hairstyle previews with a clean neutral background. Each consultation includes regeneration options depending on tier.
how_step3_desc: Choose a service offered by the Stylist or Barber, confirm pricing (USD), and schedule appointment.
how_step4_desc: Use the preview as consultation guidance. Optional after-photo can be taken with permission.
results_why_desc: Enhances natural wave pattern with minimal daily styling
upload_guide3: Pull hair away from your face.
closing_sub: AXIS HAIR™ helps you prepare, present, and perform at a higher level — without adding complexity to your workflow.
landing_hero_headline: See Your Hairstyle Before the First Cut.
landing_hero_sub: Professional AI-powered hairstyle previews before the appointment.
landing_problem_p1: Clients struggle to explain what they want.
landing_problem_p2: Stylists interpret vague descriptions or inspiration photos.
landing_problem_p3: Consultations can take time without guaranteeing clarity.
landing_solution_headline: AXIS HAIR™ transforms the consultation process.
landing_clients_exp_headline: When you share your AXIS HAIR link
landing_clients_exp_desc: Your clients get a seamless preview experience that builds trust before they even sit in the chair.
pricing_sub: AXIS HAIR™ transforms consultations into premium client experiences.
pricing_boutique_description: Perfect for independent stylists and barbers managing everyday consultations.
pricing_pro_description: Designed for high-volume professionals and growing salons.
pricing_feature_uploads_no_credits: Uploads do not consume AI credits.
pricing_consultation_unit_desc: A consultation unit allows a stylist or barber to generate hairstyle previews during a client consultation. Each unit includes AI hairstyle generation, regeneration options to refine the look, and the ability to upload an inspiration image if desired. Uploaded images do not use AI credits.
pricing_trust_col1_desc: Built specifically for hairstylists and barbers
pricing_trust_col2_desc: Visualize hairstyle possibilities with your client
pricing_trust_col3_desc: Designed to protect stylist and client data
sub_select_sub: Upgrade to gain access to unlimited AI styling previews, permanent public booking links, and professional setup resources.
faq_q1: Do my clients need to download an app?
faq_a1: No. Clients receive a secure web link they can open on any smartphone or computer without downloading anything.
faq_q2: How does the AI preview generation work?
faq_a2: The AI analyzes the client's current photo and notes, instantly generating 3 customized looks. The client can view all 3 right away, pick the one they love most, and send it to you for final approval.
faq_a3: Yes, all photos and consultation data are securely encrypted and stored with the highest enterprise-level privacy standards.
faq_q4: Can I share the high-fidelity AI previews with my clients?
faq_a4: Yes. Both the professional and the client have immediate, shared access to all generated AI previews regardless of your subscription tier. This ensures total visual alignment from the very first step.
faq_a5: Subscriptions begin immediately unless a trial is applied. Billing is processed securely through Stripe.
pricing_payment_notice: Payment method required at signup. Secure billing via Stripe. Major credit and debit cards accepted.
reliability_description: Encrypted, high-availability architecture designed for the professional salon workflow.
dash_welcome_sub: Start by creating your first consultation. The system will guide you through the rest.
dash_priority_waiting: You have {count} client{plural} waiting for a style vision.
dash_priority_approval: Awaiting your final approval on {count} consultation{plural}.
dash_priority_expiring: {count} consultation link{plural} will expire soon. Follow up now.
dash_clear_today: You're clear for today. Time to grow your vision.
dash_ready_sub: Start your first consultation to see client previews, AI recommendations, and revenue tracking in action.
dash_reset_monthly: Units reset on the 1st of each month.
dash_notification_usage_80_body: You've used 80% of your monthly Consultation Units. Consider upgrading if you need more.
dash_notification_usage_100_body: You've reached your monthly Consultation Units limit. Generation is paused until next month or upgrade.
err_ai_limit_reached: Monthly Consultation limit reached. Upgrade your plan for more units.
dash_complete_profile_prompt: Set up your profile to personalize your dashboard and booking link.
pwa_install_promo: Install for faster consultations & quick access.
pwa_scan_description: Scan this QR code with your smartphone camera to access AXIS HAIR™ instantly
pwa_share_text: Get AXIS HAIR™ - Professional hairstyle previews
client_app_share_desc: Give your clients easy access to preview hairstyles on their smartphone. No app download required - just open in their browser.
client_share_tip: Your clients can access AXIS HAIR™ directly from their browser - no app store required!
scan_to_access: Scan this code to access AXIS HAIR™
client_step_1: Scan the QR code with their phone camera
client_step_2: Open the link in their browser
client_step_3: Add to home screen for quick access (optional)

regen_generating_desc: New looks will appear as each one completes.

settings_blocked_sub: Block specific dates and times (vacations, appointments, holidays).
settings_recurring_sub: Create weekly rules that automatically block the same time every week.
settings_buffer_sub: Automatically add buffer time after each appointment for prep, cleaning, or running late.

book_sub: Fill in your details and style preferences. {stylist} will review your request and prepare for your appointment.

book_summary_confirmation: {stylist} will confirm your booking within approx. {window}.
book_summary_thanks: Thank you for booking an appointment with me, {stylist}.
book_manage_desc: You have an existing appointment request. Would you like to view, reschedule, or cancel it?
setting_confirm_window_desc: How long before you typically get back to your client to confirm? (e.g. 24 hours, 48 hours)
generating_recommendation: Generating professional structure and styling recommendation.
val_notes_req: Please provide some notes to analyze.
val_ai_fail: AI could not describe the look.
gen_style_preview_sub: AI is creating your client’s visual preview… This takes about 30–60 seconds.
no_notes: No additional notes for the client.
no_prod: Suggest products or tools the client should have ready.
no_prod_used: Record the exact products used for this client's look. Only visible to you.
arrival_note: Please arrive approximately 20 minutes prior to your appointment time.
tryon_sub: Review your personalized AI looks below, or upload your own reference photo to show your stylist.
stylist_reviewing: Your stylist is reviewing your consultation and will provide recommendations soon.
all_set: Your stylist has been notified of your preference. You're all set!
chat_error: I apologize, but I am having trouble connecting right now. Please try again later.
initial_message: Hello! I am the AXIS Support Assistant. I'm an AI assistant and not a licensed stylist. How can I help you today?
dash_most_stylists: Most stylists begin with an existing client.
photo_required_ai: A client photo is required to generate AI looks.
cancel_conf_title: Are you sure you want to cancel this appointment?
cancel_conf_desc: This will mark the consultation as cancelled. The record will be preserved but excluded from active metrics.
restore_conf_desc: This will move the consultation back to active status and include it in your metrics.
val_format_invalid: Invalid file format. Please use JPG, PNG, or WEBP.
val_no_face: No face detected. Please ensure your face is clearly visible.
val_multiple_faces: Multiple faces detected. Please ensure only one person is in the photo.
val_low_lighting: Lighting is too dim. Please use natural light or move to a brighter area.
val_extreme_angle: Tilt or angle is too extreme. Please face the camera directly.
social_kit_override: Pro Override: Consent logic bypassed for creation.
social_kit_no_consent: Client has not provided social media consent yet.
social_kit_no_preview: Generation requires both a before and after image.
social_kit_gen_error: Could not process images for social sharing. Check if photos are available.
legal_ai_disclaimer: AI-generated results are illustrative and may vary based on photo quality, lighting, and hair texture.
legal_digital_preview: Consultations are digital previews only and do not replace a physical assessment by a professional stylist.
legal_data_retention: Your data is stored securely to facilitate your consultations and style history.
legal_image_deletion: Uploaded images can be deleted at any time from your style gallery or upon account closure.
legal_no_biometrics: AXIS HAIR™ does not store biometric data or use facial recognition for identification purposes.
legal_not_affiliated: AXIS HAIR™ provides the technology platform and is not directly affiliated with individual stylists unless explicitly contracted.
legal_marketplace_clause: Stylists using this platform operate as independent professionals. AXIS HAIR™ acts as a technology intermediary for consultation management.
legal_accept_terms_signup: By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, including our AI data processing terms.
legal_terms_confirmation_desc: Before generating your first AI preview, please confirm you understand that these are digital visualizations and actual results may vary.
legal_privacy_intro: At AXIS HAIR™, we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your data.
legal_terms_intro: By using AXIS HAIR™, you agree to the following terms and conditions.
legal_cookies_intro: AXIS HAIR™ uses cookies to provide a better experience and maintain your login session.
legal_accessibility_intro: We are committed to making AXIS HAIR™ accessible to everyone.
trial_expired_body: Your 14-day free trial of AXIS HAIR™ has expired. Subscribe now to continue using AI consultations, client management, and revenue tracking.

gratitude_usage: Thank you for your dedication to professional excellence.

sebastian_pricing_desc: Professional-tier AI knowledge base for stylists and barbers.
sebastian_initial_message: Hello! I'm Sebastian™, your AXIS HAIR™ Stylist Knowledge Assistant. I can provide insights on cultural styles, trends, textures, and maintenance. How can I help your creative process today?
sebastian_placeholder: Ask about styles, trends, or textures...
sebastian_disclaimer: Sebastian™ provides general hair knowledge and is not a professional consultation.
sebastian_gate_desc: Sebastian™ is our Phase 2 Stylist Knowledge Assistant, providing deep insights into cultural hairstyles, global trends, and texture-specific care.
sebastian_upgrade_gate: I'm sorry, Sebastian™ is only available in the Professional Knowledge Tier (Phase 2). Please upgrade to access this feature.
sebastian_upgrade_sub: Get full access to Sebastian™ & premium features
sebastian_chip_1: What are the top 2026 hair trends?
sebastian_chip_2: Tell me about protective styles for 4C hair.
